# GoClaw

> GoClaw is a multi-agent AI gateway written in Go. It connects LLMs to tools, channels, and data via WebSocket RPC and OpenAI-compatible HTTP API. Supports 13+ LLM providers, agent teams, delegation, quality gates, MCP integration, and multi-tenant PostgreSQL.

## Documentation

### Getting Started
- [What is GoClaw?](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#what-is-goclaw): Overview, key features, operating modes
- [Installation](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#installation): Binary, Docker, build from source
- [Quick Start](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#quick-start): First agent in 5 minutes
- [Configuration](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#configuration): config.json, env vars, hot-reload
- [Dashboard Tour](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#dashboard-tour): Visual walkthrough of web UI
- [Migrating from OpenClaw](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#migrating-from-openclaw): Config mapping, feature comparison

### Core Concepts
- [How GoClaw Works](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#how-goclaw-works): Architecture, message flow, Think-Act-Observe cycle
- [Agents Explained](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#agents-explained): Open vs Predefined, lifecycle, context
- [Sessions & History](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#sessions-and-history): Session keys, history pipeline, auto-compaction
- [Tools Overview](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#tools-overview): 60+ tools, 12 categories, execution flow
- [Memory System](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#memory-system): Hybrid search, embeddings, memory flush
- [Multi-Tenancy](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#multi-tenancy): Identity propagation, per-user scoping, agent sharing

### Agents
- [Creating Agents](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#creating-agents): Step-by-step agent creation
- [Open vs Predefined](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#open-vs-predefined): Comparison and when to use each
- [Context Files](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#context-files): 7 context file types
- [System Prompts](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#system-prompts): 15+ system prompt sections
- [Agent Overrides](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#agent-overrides): Per-user customization
- [Summoning Agents](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#summoning-agents): @mention, slash commands, pairing

### Providers
- [Provider Overview](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#providers-overview): All 13+ supported LLM providers
- [OpenAI / Azure](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-openai), [Anthropic](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-anthropic), [Google](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-google), [Groq](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-groq), [Ollama](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-ollama), [OpenRouter](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-openrouter), [Cerebras](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-cerebras), [DeepSeek](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-deepseek), [XAI](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-xai), [Requesty](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-requesty), [Cloudflare](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-cloudflare), [Custom](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-custom)
- [Fallback & Routing](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#provider-fallback): Multi-provider resilience

### Channels
- [Channel Overview](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#channels-overview): All 6 supported channels
- [Telegram](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#channel-telegram), [Discord](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#channel-discord), [Slack](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#channel-slack), [WhatsApp](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#channel-whatsapp), [WebSocket](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#channel-websocket), [REST API](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#channel-rest)

### Agent Teams
- [Teams Overview](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#teams-overview): Multi-agent collaboration
- [Creating Teams](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#creating-teams), [Delegation Protocol](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#delegation-protocol), [Team Strategies](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#team-strategies), [WS Team Events](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#ws-team-events)

### Advanced
- [Custom Tools](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#custom-tools), [MCP Integration](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#mcp-integration), [Skills & Bootstrap](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#skills-bootstrap), [Scheduling & Cron](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#scheduling-cron), [Extended Thinking](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#extended-thinking), [Security & Encryption](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#security-encryption), [Tracing & Observability](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#tracing-observability), [Store & Data Model](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#store-data-model)

### Deployment
- [Docker](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#deploy-docker), [Cloudflare Pages](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#deploy-cloudflare), [Env Variables](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#deploy-env-vars), [Production Checklist](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#deploy-checklist)

### Recipes
- [Telegram Bot](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#recipe-telegram-bot), [Multi-Channel Agent](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#recipe-multi-channel), [Code Review Bot](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#recipe-code-review), [RAG with Memory](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#recipe-rag-memory), [Scheduled Reports](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#recipe-scheduled)

### Reference
- [API Reference](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#api-reference), [WebSocket Protocol](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#websocket-protocol), [Configuration Reference](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#config-reference), [Tool Reference](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#tool-reference)

### Troubleshooting
- [Common Issues](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#common-issues), [FAQ](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#faq), [Debug Guide](https://docs.goclaw.sh/#debug-guide)

## Full Documentation

- [llms-full.txt](https://docs.goclaw.sh/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation in a single file for LLM consumption
